# OSLogEnumerator

**Class**

An enumerator that can access and list log entries.

## Declaration

```swift
class OSLogEnumerator
```

## Enumerator Options

- **OSLogEnumerator.Options**: Option to control the direction of the iteration.

## Read Log Entries

- **OSLogStore**: A set of entries from the unified logging system.

## Inherits From

- NSEnumerator

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSFastEnumeration
- NSObjectProtocol
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
- Sequence
